The '''[[Wigan Warriors]]''' play [[Rugby League]] in [[Wigan]], [[England]]. Their 2013 season results in the [[Super League XVIII]] and [[2013 Challenge Cup]] are shown below.

==Challenge Cup==
{{main|2013 Challenge Cup}}
After finishing first in the [[Super League XVII]] as [[League Leaders' Shield|league leaders]], Wigan Warriors entered the [[2013 Challenge Cup]] at the fourth round. Wins against [[Leigh Centurions]], [[Hull Kingston Rovers|Hull KR]], and [[Widnes Vikings]] saw them reach the semi-finals where they nilled [[London Broncos]] in a 70 point thrashing. The final saw them nill opponents [[Hull F.C.]] to win the 2013 Challenge Cup, their 19th title, after their most last victory in [[2011 Challenge Cup|2011]].
